description.en: A single flour, just buckwheat, bound into a loaf with a psyllium husk gel instead of gluten. Baked first in a tin, then finished free-standing on the oven rack for a crisp shell around a moist, naturally gluten-free crumb.
description.de: Nur ein Mehl, reiner Buchweizen, mit einem Flohsamenschalen-Gel statt Gluten zu einem Brot gebunden. Erst in der Form, dann freistehend auf dem Ofenrost fertiggebacken, für eine knusprige Schale um eine feuchte, von Natur aus glutenfreie Krume.
description.es: Una sola harina, puro alforfón, ligada en un pan con un gel de cáscara de psilio en lugar de gluten. Horneado primero en molde y terminado luego suelto sobre la rejilla, para una corteza crujiente alrededor de una miga húmeda y sin gluten de forma natural.
description.fr: Une seule farine, du sarrasin pur, liée en un pain grâce à un gel de psyllium à la place du gluten. Cuit d'abord en moule, puis terminé posé sur la grille du four pour une croûte croustillante autour d'une mie humide, naturellement sans gluten.

origin.note: Buckwheat breads have deep roots across Eastern Europe and the Alps, but this single-flour, psyllium-bound, yeasted formula is a 21st-century gluten-free-baking technique rather than a traditional recipe.

yield.shape: 9 x 5 in loaf pan, finished free-standing on the oven rack

method.title: Make the psyllium gel
method.summary: Stir whole psyllium husks into the water with the apple cider vinegar; let sit 1-2 minutes until it thickens into a gel.

method.title: Mix dry
method.summary: In a separate bowl, combine the buckwheat flour, salt, instant yeast and sugar.

method.title: Combine
method.summary: Add the psyllium gel to the dry ingredients and mix by hand or with an electric mixer into a soft, sticky dough.

method.title: Pan and proof
method.summary: Scrape into a greased loaf pan with a wet spatula, cover, and let rise in a draft-free spot 30-60 minutes until the dough reaches the rim.

method.title: Bake in the pan
method.summary: Bake at 175°C with a dish of water in the oven for steam, 50 minutes.

method.title: Finish free-standing
method.summary: Turn the loaf out of the pan directly onto the oven rack and bake a further 30 minutes to firm and crisp the crust all around.

method.title: Cool
method.summary: Cool completely on a rack before slicing.

source.adaptation: Salt recorded at the midpoint of the source's 10-12g range.
